$comment: Cross-repo lockstep pin (spec 006). Binds the acme-vue-encore generator + module catalog to the template-encore baseline structure and to the frozen app-invariant spec hashes (the `encore-app-architecture` and `security-data-invariants` invariants). The invariant-hash pin was deferred through Phase 1 and Phase 2 (`encore-app-architecture` absorbed the static-serving wiring from spec 004 in Phase 2, so pinning its hash earlier would have locked a value about to change) and is now ACTIVE: the Phase 3 handshake flipped invariantPin.status to 'pinned', filled the invariant spec.md SHA-256 content hashes, and bumped pinnedRef to the finalized template-encore main. Re-hash drift on either invariant now fails the gate (FR-002). pinnedRef advanced b37d3d7 -> c7603ee (2026-06-24) with the invariant hashes re-hashed identical and the core services unchanged, then c7603ee -> 89326a5 (2026-07-04). Unlike the earlier hash-identical refreshes, this advance deliberately re-blesses CHANGED invariant hashes: template-encore reworked security-data-invariants INV-6 from the Redis rate-limiter-flexible middleware to Postgres-native fixed-window rate limiting (a new UNLOGGED rate_limit_counter table + migrations, apiRateLimit now also on the gateway service) and a user_account email column change, and renumbered its corpus to serial 000-016, which together rewrote both invariant spec.md files. The intervening main commits were reviewed, the pinned core services are all present and unchanged at 89326a5, and the module catalog is factory-encore's own (unaffected by the baseline move). Advancing the pin here is the coupling-gated decision (spec 006) to adopt that baseline; a future ref or hash bump remains an equally deliberate edit. Note: invariantPin.specs and hashes keep template-encore's numbered paths (specs/001-..., specs/002-...) because the checker fetches those exact paths at pinnedRef; the 000-016 renumber kept both invariants at 001/002, so the paths still resolve.

invariantPin.reason: Phase 3 handshake (2026-06-23): both invariants finalized in template-encore at b37d3d7; pin advanced to c7603ee (main) on 2026-06-24 with both hashes re-verified identical, then to 89326a5 (main) on 2026-07-04. The 89326a5 advance re-blesses CHANGED hashes: template-encore moved INV-6 to Postgres-native rate limiting and renumbered its corpus (000-016), rewriting both invariant spec.md files. Each value is the SHA-256 of the invariant spec.md at the pinned ref (matching check.ts sha256File); a re-hash mismatch is reported as DRIFT and fails the gate.
